summary: Use the actual auth-header name (Authorization vs X-Figma-Token) in the --dry-run echo in internal/client/client.go.
reason: Sister to pat-auth-wiring: when AuthHeader() returns an X-Figma-Token-prefixed value, the live request path correctly routes it to that header. The dryRun branch hardcoded 'Authorization' as the label, so --dry-run output misled PAT users into thinking the request would carry an Authorization header. Mirror the prefix detection so the label matches the live header. Greptile P2 on PR #380.
